title: Section 18
content: Nothing in this Act shall affect the provisions of section 31 of the Reformatory Schools Act, 1897 (8 of 1897), or sub-section (2) of section 5 of the Prevention of Corruption Act, 1947 (2 of 1947), 1 * * * or of any law in force in any State relating to juvenile offenders or Borstal Schools.
footnote: 1 The words and figures “or the Suppression of Immoral Traffic in Women and Girls Act, 1956” omitted by Act 46 of 1978, s. 20 (w.e.f. 2-1-1979).
